description_long: This object is a rectangular bottle with a frosted, semi-transparent lower section and a solid, dark brown cap. The bottle is made of glass or plastic and contains a beige liquid, likely a cosmetic lotion or foundation. The front face displays the brand 'Natura Una' and the product name 'Base Matte Gold', along with additional product information in smaller text. The back face features more detailed instructions or ingredients in fine print. The cap is smooth, opaque, and contrasts with the lighter body of the bottle. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and a professional appearance.
description: A rectangular frosted bottle with a dark brown cap, containing beige lotion and minimalist branding.
description_view_0: Back view showing fine print product information and a smooth, dark cap.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible text, highlighting the frosted bottle and cap contrast.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the 'Natura Una' brand, product name, and key details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain with no visible text, showing the bottle's clean lines.
